name: MoneyMax Title Loans
description_short: LoanStar Title Loans offers auto title loans up to $10,000 with quick funding across multiple Houston-area locations. Founded in 1990, they provide collateral-based emergency cash using vehicle equity.
description_long:
LoanStar Title Loans was founded in 1990 in Jonesboro, Georgia, and has operated for over 25 years as a title loan provider serving hardworking Americans who need emergency cash. The company positions itself as helping consumers access funds by leveraging the equity in their vehicles, targeting those facing short-term financial needs. They operate multiple locations throughout the Houston metropolitan area, including Spring, Texas, indicating established regional presence and accessibility.

LoanStar's core service is auto title loans, which allow borrowers to use their vehicle's title as collateral to secure loans ranging up to $10,000. They offer both multiple installment and single installment loan options with transparent fee schedules provided at different loan amounts ($600, $1,200, $2,000 disclosed examples). The company provides online payment capabilities, account registration, and a toll-free number for inquiries. Their standard business hours are Monday-Friday 10:00 AM - 6:00 PM and Saturday 9:00 AM - 2:00 PM across locations.

LoanStar distinguishes itself through longevity in the industry (25+ years), multiple convenient Houston-area locations within close proximity to borrowers, and transparent fee disclosure through published fee schedules for both installment types. They provide higher loan amounts ($10,000 maximum) compared to typical payday loans, making them suitable for larger emergency expenses. The company maintains compliance documentation including OCCC notices and license information on their website.

However, title loans carry inherent risks: vehicle repossession is the primary consequence of default, making them high-stakes borrowing despite fast funding. The website provides limited detail on actual APR rates, terms, or borrower requirements beyond the fee schedule links. One reviewed location (5918 FM 1960 West) is permanently closed, indicating customers must verify current location availability. As a collateral-based lender in the emergency-cash category, LoanStar serves urgent needs but requires borrowers to risk vehicle ownership.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Loans up to $10,000 available — significantly higher than typical payday loans
25+ years of operating history demonstrates long-term business stability
Multiple Houston-area locations (5 nearby stores) provide convenience and accessibility
Transparent fee schedules published for different loan amounts and installment types
Online payment and account registration available for convenience
Both multiple installment and single installment loan options offered
Same-day or rapid funding typical for title loans in this category
cons: Vehicle repossession risk if loan defaults — borrower loses primary collateral
Website lacks published APR rates, making true cost comparison difficult
Limited information on eligibility requirements, approval timeline, or required documentation
One advertised location (5918 FM 1960 West) is permanently closed; requires verification before visiting
Title loans are high-risk financial products that trap consumers in debt cycles
best_for: Vehicle owners facing immediate emergency cash needs ($1,000-$10,000 range)
Borrowers who need larger amounts than payday loans provide but have limited credit access
Consumers in Houston metropolitan area with convenient access to multiple locations
diagnosis: LoanStar Title Loans is best for vehicle owners in the Houston area facing genuine emergency expenses who need $1,000-$10,000 quickly and have limited traditional credit access. The critical caveat is that title loans risk vehicle repossession—the borrower's primary collateral and often essential transportation—making default financially devastating. Borrowers should exhaust all alternatives before using vehicle equity as emergency collateral.
services: Published fee schedules and disclosure documents
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 5918 Farm to Market 1960 Rd W, Houston, TX 77069
